---
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Who am I ?

Hey ! Thank you for reaching my portfolio !\
Let me presents me first !\
I'm Mathys Carboila Dias, a student in Master Degree in Computers Graphics at Limoges.

## My Projects

Here I'll share some of my academic and professional project:

## Some of my Social Media

- [My GitHub](https://github.com/arksena)
